internal_anchors.details: All 207 unique href="#..." targets resolve to elements present in docs/index.html. All 12 showTab() targets match a ds-tab-content id.

tab_structure.details: 12 tab-content divs (overview, evaluate, model, selftest, wins, pages, killshots, timestamp, predictions, falsify, ai, refs); sectionNav chain continuous and bidirectional; first prev=null, last next=null; heading hierarchy clean across all tabs.

transport_artifacts: https://funwithscience.net/dome-model-review/ (TLS handshake fails from sandbox; site is live — confirmed by other agents and direct browser access)
https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/... (HTTP 403 — known bot-blocking, also a citation domain that's normally skipped)
external_links.details: 1 confirmed-broken citation (raw-text/03-predictions.txt — 404, dome author removed mirror). All other failures are sandbox transport artifacts (sandbox TLS/SNI quirks or anti-bot 403s) on hosts that are otherwise healthy.

data_prose_consistency.details: wins.json=71; verdict prose tallies all match (Refuted by Data 9, Self-Contradicted 14, Misleading 22, Std Model Explains 18, Not Demonstrated 4, Unfalsifiable 4 = 71). new_in_v51=32. uncounted-failures=10 — '10 acknowledged failures' present. llms.txt cites 71 WIN entries / 69 dome IDs / site URL / 0 confirmed framing. <meta description>, og:title, og:description all reference 69 claims and 10 acknowledged failures.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 71 wins.json ids have a matching id="winNNN" anchor in HTML. All 71 summary-table rows carry the verdict color class matching the verdict text (v-refuted/v-selfcon/v-misleading/v-std/v-notdemo/v-unfalsifiable). All 71 entries have populated tldr_evidence and tldr_verdict. 8 detail_groups present, internally consistent.

win_alignment_with_dome.details:
Dome wins.html has 71

WIN-NNN

renderings across 69 unique IDs. Three IDs appear twice (cross-reference aliases — same pattern as 2026-04-28; no new collisions). All 69 dome WIN IDs are covered by our review (wins.json adds 057b/058b sub-entries). No title-drift problems beyond cosmetic capitalization differences.

progressive_disclosure.details: 349 <details> blocks, 345 <summary> blocks. 207 of 223 <h2> elements live inside a <summary>. All 13 genuinely-prospective predictions in predictions.json carry a tldr field. wins.json: 71/71 carry tldr_evidence + tldr_verdict.

theme_colors.details: 0 hardcoded light backgrounds in sections.json. 3 hardcoded greys (color:#555 in part4.html, part5.html, part6.html — minor, below moderate threshold; carry-forward; optional utility-class refactor).

uncounted_failures_schema.details: 10 entries; all FAIL-NNN ids unique; all carry dome_ref and what_actually_happened; HTML prose '10 acknowledged failures' matches.

EXP-259 orphan from prior reports is now resolved (integrated 2026-04-28T09:23:59Z, integration_mode=direct_apply).

queue_coupling.details: All section-new / category-proposal-writeup tracker items have a matching priority-queue entry.

test_suite.details: node test.js: 3,501 passed, 0 failed (wins.json schema, HTML output consistency, internal links, build pipeline, data cross-references, sections.json schema, prose content integrity, prediction panels, Phase A design refresh).

issues_found.description: data/wins.json.bak (71,743 bytes) was committed to git on 2026-04-29T07:06:05Z by workspace-sync (commit 2b82975). The file shouldn't be tracked — wins.json is the canonical source, and a .bak left by some agent was picked up by workspace-sync's universal-pusher mode and pushed. .gitignore does not cover *.bak.
issues_found.location: data/wins.json.bak (in both git HEAD and FUSE workspace)
issues_found.suggested_fix: From a clean clone: `git rm data/wins.json.bak && echo '*.bak' >> .gitignore && git add .gitignore && git commit -m 'remove stray wins.json.bak; ignore *.bak' && git push`. Then delete the FUSE copy too. Also investigate which agent wrote the .bak; suspect a recent direct-apply integration (EXP-259 patch landed 2026-04-28T09:24Z and may have left it).

issues_found.description: docs/index.html cites raw-text/03-predictions.txt on the dome site, which 404s (the dome author has removed the raw-text directory; spot-checks of 02-wins, 04-coordinates, 05-model, 06-evolution, 08-live-power all 404 too). Carry-forward from 2026-04-28; not yet fixed.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Replace with predictions.html anchor or drop the citation. Source is in data/sections.json — search for '03-predictions.txt' and revise the prose block.

issues_found.description: Dome wins.html uses WIN-057, WIN-058, and WIN-062 each for two distinct claims. Inflates the dome's '69 confirmed' count — actual unique-ID count is 69 but 71 renderings. Same as 2026-04-28; no new collisions.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Already covered: wins.json carries 057b/058b sub-entries that capture both versions. No action required on our side — informational.

issues_found.description: 16 unprocessed curmudgeon reviews (above the 10-threshold). By prefix: EXP=10, SEC=3, WIN=2, overview=1. Dominated by recent (2026-04-26 onward) EXP-* proposal/section-new reviews. Not a digest filter regression — EXP-* is accepted; this is normal pipeline lag awaiting the next decider run.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Will self-resolve when the decider next runs. If it persists past the next decider cycle, investigate.

issues_found.description: Two non-JSON stray files in the FUSE workspace (carry-forward, both pre-existing): (1) monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/WIN-067.c3.json.build.js — 0 bytes, 2026-04-21 — should be deleted; (2) monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-202.json.bak — 21KB, 2026-04-22 — EXP-202 is now integrated:true, so this draft .bak is dead weight.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Delete from FUSE workspace; verify EXP-202.json.bak content is captured in the live EXP-202.json before deletion (it is — EXP-202 is integrated).

issues_found.description: 3 hardcoded color:#555 inline styles in sections.json (part4.html, part5.html, part6.html). Below moderate threshold. Repeat-offender pattern across muted-text contexts; would benefit from a utility class.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Optional: factor into a muted-text utility class (e.g., .ds-muted) in the stylesheet and replace inline color:#555.

summary: Site is structurally sound. Build is byte-identical to source data; test suite passes 3,501/0; all internal anchors, tab navigation, heading hierarchy, data-prose tallies, WIN detail anchors, verdict color classes, progressive-disclosure structure, discoverability files, and CLAUDE.md mechanical checks pass. Six moderate/minor warnings (one new today, five carry-forward): a stray data/wins.json.bak committed to git by workspace-sync at 07:06Z (NEW, fix priority); the carry-forward 404 on dome's raw-text/03-predictions.txt citation; the dome's WIN-057/058/062 number-collision aliases (informational); 16 unprocessed reviews (normal lag); two pre-existing workspace stray files (.json.build.js and .json.bak); and 3 hardcoded color:#555 (minor).
